title: Desktop and Taskbar Features
subtitle: Learn, Explore, Click!
overview: This session helps students understand the desktop screen, taskbar features, icons, start menu, shortcuts, and how to use basic computer navigation in Windows.

images._note: Add screenshots of desktop, taskbar, start menu, icons, folders, and student practical activities.

gallery.caption: Desktop — Main screen of the computer
Taskbar helps open and switch applications quickly
Start Menu gives access to apps and settings
Icons are shortcuts to programs and files
Folders help organize files and documents

keyTopics: Desktop — Main screen after computer starts
Taskbar — Shows running apps and shortcuts
Start Menu — Access apps, files, and settings
Recycle Bin — Stores deleted files temporarily
Clock and Notification Area — Shows time and alerts
Search Bar — Helps find files and applications quickly

youtubeVideos.title: Introduction to Desktop and Taskbar
youtubeVideos._note: Replace videoId with actual YouTube video ID from the URL
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn the basics of desktop and taskbar in Windows.

youtubeVideos.title: Windows Desktop Explained for Beginners
youtubeVideos.desc: Understanding icons, taskbar, and start menu.

activity.title: Explore the Desktop and Taskbar
steps: Start the computer and observe the desktop screen
Identify desktop icons like This PC and Recycle Bin
Click the Start button and open applications
Observe the taskbar and running apps
Use search bar to find Paint or Calculator

options: The main screen of a computer
quiz.explanation: Desktop is the main screen that appears after the computer starts.

quiz.q: Which part of the screen shows running applications?
quiz.explanation: Taskbar shows opened and running applications.

quiz.q: What does the Start Menu help you do?
quiz.explanation: Start Menu provides access to applications, files, and settings.
Icons are small pictures used to open programs and files.

quiz.q: Which icon stores deleted files temporarily?
quiz.explanation: Recycle Bin stores deleted files temporarily.
Wallpaper is the background picture on the desktop.

quiz.q: Where is the clock usually displayed in Windows?
quiz.explanation: Clock is displayed on the right side of the taskbar.

quiz.q: Which feature helps you quickly find apps and files?
quiz.explanation: Search Bar helps find applications and files quickly.

quiz.q: What happens when you minimize a window?
quiz.explanation: Minimized windows move to the taskbar.

quiz.q: Which device is mainly used to click desktop icons?
quiz.explanation: Mouse helps select and click icons on the desktop.
